title: Colors — Monologue
description: Listen, then prove you were listening

_voiceScript.script: Marek: Ahoj. Volám sa Marek. Mám hnedé vlasy a modré oči. Moja obľúbená farba je modrá. Páči sa mi aj šedá. Môj pes Rex je hnedý zlatý retriever. Má čierne oči a bielu hruď. Nepáči sa mi žltá. Sara: Ahoj. Volám sa Sara. Mám blond vlasy a hnedé oči. Moja mačka Luna je biela. Má zelené oči. Moja obľúbená farba je ružová. Ale páči sa mi aj červená. Nepáči sa mi oranžová.

exercises.conversationTranscriptSk: Marek: Ahoj. Volám sa Marek. Mám hnedé vlasy a modré oči. Moja obľúbená farba je modrá. Páči sa mi aj šedá. Môj pes Rex je hnedý zlatý retriever. Má čierne oči a bielu hruď. Nepáči sa mi žltá. Sara: Ahoj. Volám sa Sara. Mám blond vlasy a hnedé oči. Moja mačka Luna je biela. Má zelené oči. Moja obľúbená farba je ružová. Ale páči sa mi aj červená. Nepáči sa mi oranžová.

exercises.instruction: Tap every word or expression you heard in the conversation.

exercises.conversationTranscriptSk: Marek: Ahoj. Volám sa Marek. Mám hnedé vlasy a modré oči. Moja obľúbená farba je modrá. Páči sa mi aj šedá. Môj pes Rex je hnedý zlatý retriever. Má čierne oči a bielu hruď. Nepáči sa mi žltá. Sara: Ahoj. Volám sa Sara. Mám blond vlasy a hnedé oči. Moja mačka Luna je biela. Má zelené oči. Moja obľúbená farba je ružová. Ale páči sa mi aj červená. Nepáči sa mi oranžová.

questions.questionEn: Marek says "Mám hnedé vlasy a modré oči." What does this mean?

answers.textEn: I have black hair and green eyes
I have brown hair and blue eyes
I have blond hair and brown eyes

questions.answerMeaning: "Mám hnedé vlasy a modré oči" = I have brown hair and blue eyes. Hnedé vlasy and modré oči come from Describing Colors.

questions.questionEn: What does Marek say about blue and grey?

answers.textEn: He does not like blue, but he likes yellow
His dog is blue and grey
His favorite color is blue, and he also likes grey

questions.answerMeaning: "Moja obľúbená farba je modrá. Páči sa mi aj šedá" = My favorite color is blue. I also like grey.

answers.textEn: Rex is a brown golden retriever with black eyes and a white chest
Rex is a white cat with green eyes
Rex is a black dog with yellow eyes

questions.answerMeaning: Marek says: "Môj pes Rex je hnedý zlatý retriever. Má čierne oči a bielu hruď." Hnedý = brown, čierne = black, bielu = white.

reviewPair.slovak: Hnedý pes / čierne oči / bielu hruď
reviewPair.english: Brown dog / black eyes / white chest

questions.questionEn: Sara says "Mám blond vlasy a hnedé oči." What does this mean?

answers.textEn: I have red hair and blue eyes
I have blond hair and brown eyes
I have brown hair and green eyes

questions.answerMeaning: "Mám blond vlasy a hnedé oči" = I have blond hair and brown eyes. Blond vlasy and hnedé oči are description phrases.

answers.textEn: Luna is brown and has black eyes
Luna is orange and has blue eyes
Luna is white and has green eyes

questions.answerMeaning: Sara says: "Moja mačka Luna je biela. Má zelené oči" = My cat Luna is white. She has green eyes.

questions.questionEn: Which colors does Sara like, and which color does she not like?

answers.textEn: She likes pink and red, but she does not like orange
She likes yellow and grey, but she does not like blue
She likes orange and black, but she does not like white

questions.answerMeaning: "Moja obľúbená farba je ružová. Ale páči sa mi aj červená. Nepáči sa mi oranžová" = My favorite color is pink. I also like red. I do not like orange.

sentences.promptEn: My name is Marek. I have brown hair and blue eyes.
My favorite color is blue. I also like grey.
My dog Rex is brown. He has black eyes and a white chest.
My name is Sara. I have blond hair and brown eyes.
My cat Luna is white. She has green eyes.
My favorite color is pink. I also like red. I do not like orange.
